package rulefixtures

import (
	"encoding/xml"
	"io"
)

// scenario for xml_decoder_without_entity_limit: `xml.NewDecoder(r)` processing untrusted XML without setting `d.Entity = nil` and without input size limits
// fixture polarity: negative; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario749Negative(reader io.Reader, target any) error {
	limited := io.LimitReader(reader, 1<<20)
	decoder := xml.NewDecoder(limited)
	decoder.Entity = map[string]string{}
	return decoder.Decode(target)
}
